mapper.select:
SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.DEPARTMENT_ID, D.DEPARTMENT_NAME, U.CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG, U.DEFAULT_SITE_ID, S.SITE_NAME, U.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID, L.LANGUAGE_NAME, U.PHONE_OFFICE, U.PHONE_MOBILE, U.PHONE_HOME, U.PHONE_OTHER, U.EMAIL_ID, U.SEX_FLAG, U.BIRTHDAY, U.EXPIRE_DATE, U.PASS_EXPIRE_DATE, U.ENTER_DATE, U.RETIRE_DATE, U.LAST_HOST_NAME, U.LAST_LOGIN_DTTM, U.LAST_IPV4_ADDRESS, U.LAST_IPV6_ADDRESS, U.LAST_MAC_ADDRESS, U.LAST_MAC_ADDRESS2, U.USER_GROUP1, U.USER_GROUP2, U.USER_GROUP3, U.USER_GROUP4, U.USER_GROUP5, U.USER_GROUP6, U.USER_GROUP7, U.USER_GROUP8, U.USER_GROUP9, U.USER_GROUP10, U.DELETE_FLAG, U.DELETE_DATE, U.DELETE_COMMENT, U.CREATOR_ID, U.CREATE_DTTM, U.MODIFIER_ID, U.MODIFY_DTTM FROM NB_USERS U WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT JOIN NB_SITES S WITH (NOLOCK) ON U.DEFAULT_SITE_ID = S.SITE_ID AND S.SITE_TYPE = '00' LEFT JOIN NB_LANGUAGES L WITH (NOLOCK) ON U.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID = L.LANGUAGE_ID AND L.IS_ENABLE_FLAG = 'Y' LEFT JOIN NB_DEPARTMENTS D WITH (NOLOCK) ON U.DEPARTMENT_ID = D.DEPARTMENT_ID AND D.DELETE_FLAG = 'N' WHERE 1 = 1
AND (U.DELETE_FLAG IS NULL OR U.DELETE_FLAG != 'Y')
AND U.DEFAULT_SITE_ID = #{siteId}
AND U.USER_ID LIKE '%' + #{userId} + '%'
ORDER BY U.USER_ID ASC

SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NAME, U.DEPARTMENT_ID, D.DEPARTMENT_NAME, U.CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG, U.DEFAULT_SITE_ID, S.SITE_NAME, U.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID, L.LANGUAGE_NAME, U.PHONE_OFFICE, U.PHONE_MOBILE, U.PHONE_HOME, U.PHONE_OTHER, U.EMAIL_ID, U.SEX_FLAG, U.BIRTHDAY, U.EXPIRE_DATE, U.PASS_EXPIRE_DATE, U.ENTER_DATE, U.RETIRE_DATE, U.LAST_HOST_NAME, U.LAST_LOGIN_DTTM, U.LAST_IPV4_ADDRESS, U.LAST_IPV6_ADDRESS, U.LAST_MAC_ADDRESS, U.LAST_MAC_ADDRESS2, U.USER_GROUP1, U.USER_GROUP2, U.USER_GROUP3, U.USER_GROUP4, U.USER_GROUP5, U.USER_GROUP6, U.USER_GROUP7, U.USER_GROUP8, U.USER_GROUP9, U.USER_GROUP10, U.DELETE_FLAG, U.DELETE_DATE, U.DELETE_COMMENT, U.CREATOR_ID, U.CREATE_DTTM, U.MODIFIER_ID, U.MODIFY_DTTM FROM NB_USERS U LEFT JOIN NB_SITES S ON U.DEFAULT_SITE_ID = S.SITE_ID AND S.SITE_TYPE = '00' LEFT JOIN NB_LANGUAGES L ON U.DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID = L.LANGUAGE_ID AND L.IS_ENABLE_FLAG = 'Y' LEFT JOIN NB_DEPARTMENTS D ON U.DEPARTMENT_ID = D.DEPARTMENT_ID AND D.DELETE_FLAG = 'N' WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NB_USERS ( USER_ID, USER_NAME, ENCODE_PASSWORD, DEPARTMENT_ID, CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG, DEFAULT_SITE_ID, DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID, PHONE_OFFICE, PHONE_MOBILE, PHONE_HOME, PHONE_OTHER, EMAIL_ID, SEX_FLAG, BIRTHDAY, EXPIRE_DATE, PASS_EXPIRE_DATE, ENTER_DATE, RETIRE_DATE, USER_GROUP1, USER_GROUP2, USER_GROUP3, USER_GROUP4, USER_GROUP5, USER_GROUP6, USER_GROUP7, USER_GROUP8, USER_GROUP9, USER_GROUP10, DELETE_FLAG, CREATOR_ID, CREATE_DTTM, MODIFIER_ID, MODIFY_DTTM ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{encodePassword}, #{departmentId}, #{changePasswordFlag}, #{defaultSiteId}, #{defaultLanguageId}, #{phoneOffice}, #{phoneMobile}, #{phoneHome}, #{phoneOther}, #{emailId}, #{sexFlag}, #{birthday}, #{expireDate}, #{passExpireDate}, #{enterDate}, #{retireDate}, #{userGroup1}, #{userGroup2}, #{userGroup3}, #{userGroup4}, #{userGroup5}, #{userGroup6}, #{userGroup7}, #{userGroup8}, #{userGroup9}, #{userGroup10}, 'N', #{creatorId}, FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'), #{creatorId}, FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss') )
mapper.update:
UPDATE NB_USERS
USER_NAME = #{userName},
ENCODE_PASSWORD = #{encodePassword},
CHANGE_PASSWORD_FLAG = #{changePasswordFlag},
DEPARTMENT_ID = NULL #{departmentId} ,
DEFAULT_SITE_ID = #{defaultSiteId},
DEFAULT_LANGUAGE_ID = #{defaultLanguageId},
PHONE_OFFICE = #{phoneOffice},
PHONE_MOBILE = #{phoneMobile},
PHONE_HOME = #{phoneHome},
PHONE_OTHER = #{phoneOther},
EMAIL_ID = #{emailId},
SEX_FLAG = #{sexFlag},
BIRTHDAY = #{birthday},
EXPIRE_DATE = #{expireDate},
PASS_EXPIRE_DATE = #{passExpireDate},
ENTER_DATE = #{enterDate},
RETIRE_DATE = #{retireDate},
USER_GROUP1 = #{userGroup1},
USER_GROUP2 = #{userGroup2},
USER_GROUP3 = #{userGroup3},
USER_GROUP4 = #{userGroup4},
USER_GROUP5 = #{userGroup5},
USER_GROUP6 = #{userGroup6},
USER_GROUP7 = #{userGroup7},
USER_GROUP8 = #{userGroup8},
USER_GROUP9 = #{userGroup9},
USER_GROUP10 = #{userGroup10},
MODIFIER_ID = #{modifierId}, MODIFY_DTTM = FORMAT(GETDATE(), 'yyyyMMddHHmmss')
WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
